name: Expired Token
description: This JWT expired hours ago — the server will reject it. Decode the token, find the expired 'exp' claim, and forge a fresh token with a future expiration to capture the flag.
hints: The red banner shows this token expired long ago — the 'exp' claim is far in the past
The Decoder Tool reveals the payload: exp:1680003600 which is March 2023
Servers reject tokens with exp < now — try forging a new token with a future exp using the Generator Tool
